termsPage.pageDescription: Terms and Conditions for using wereklub.com and attending Wêrê Klub events.
termsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
termsPage.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services or attending our unique events.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.p1: Welcome to Wêrê Klub ("we," "us," or "our"). Based in Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire, we organize music events and related services. These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of our website (e.g., wereklub.com), our services (including event promotion and organization), and your attendance at our events.
introduction.p2: Wêrê Klub is built around energy, openness, and respect on the dancefloor—qualities we channel into creating unique, freeing experiences. By accessing our services, purchasing tickets, or attending our events, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of these Terms, you may not access our services or attend our events.

mission.title: Our Mission & Your Experience
mission.p1: We curate events that leave room for different sounds and audiences in Abidjan. Our aim is welcoming spaces where people can discover music and enjoy themselves responsibly.
mission.p2: Our values include openness, respect, and safety on the dancefloor. Everyone attending is expected to behave responsibly toward staff, artists, and other guests.

conduct.title: Use of Our Services & Event Conduct
conduct.p1: You agree to use our website and services only for lawful purposes and in a manner that respects the rights and enjoyment of others. When attending Wêrê Klub events:
conduct.listItem1: You must behave in a way that is respectful to all individuals, regardless of race, culture, or social class, reflecting the diverse community we cultivate.
conduct.listItem2: Prohibited behavior includes harassment, discrimination, causing distress or inconvenience to any person, transmitting obscene or offensive content, or disrupting the event.
conduct.listItem3: You must comply with all venue regulations, health and safety guidelines, and instructions from event staff. Events may be held in a wide range of spaces, including non-traditional or temporary venues.
conduct.p2: When registering for information, newsletters, or (where applicable) event pre-sales, you must provide accurate and current information.

tickets.title: Event Tickets and Admission
tickets.p1: All ticket sales for Wêrê Klub events are subject to availability and any specific terms communicated at the time of purchase (e.g., age restrictions, specific entry requirements for unique venues).
tickets.p2: Tickets are generally non-refundable and non-transferable, except as required by applicable law or as explicitly stated by us for a particular event. We reserve the right to cancel or reschedule events; in such cases, our refund or exchange policy will be communicated to ticket holders.
tickets.p3: We reserve the right to refuse admission or eject any person whose conduct is deemed disorderly, who fails to comply with these Terms, specific event rules, or our core values, or who poses a risk to the safety or enjoyment of others. No refunds will be offered in such circumstances.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.p1: All content related to Wêrê Klub, including our name, logos and branding (e.g., "Wêrê Klub"), event concepts, DJ sets and recordings (by residents, guests, and performers when shared by us), text, graphics, images, and audio clips on our website or promotional materials, is the property of Wêrê Klub or its content suppliers/partners and protected by international copyright and trademark laws.
ip.p2: You may not reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, resell, or exploit any portion of our service, event content, or branding without express written permission from us.

userContent.title: User-Generated Content
userContent.p1: If you post content or submit material related to our events (e.g., photos, videos, comments on social media tagging Wêrê Klub or using our event hashtags), and unless we indicate otherwise, you grant Wêrê Klub a nonexclusive, royalty-free, perpetual, irrevocable, and fully sublicensable right to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, translate, create derivative works from, distribute, and display such content throughout the world in any media. This is primarily for promoting the Wêrê Klub experience, showcasing our vibrant community, and highlighting the unique atmosphere of our events.
userContent.p2: You represent and warrant that you own or control all rights to the content you post, that it's accurate, that its use doesn't violate these Terms, and will not cause injury to any person or entity. You agree to indemnify Wêrê Klub for all claims resulting from content you supply.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: Wêrê Klub, its organizers, and its affiliates will not be liable for any damages of any kind arising from the use of our services or attendance at our events, including, but not limited to direct, indirect, incidental, punitive, and consequential damages, unless otherwise specified in writing.
liability.p2: Your attendance at our events, including those held in unconventional or repurposed venues, is at your own risk. While we strive to ensure safety, you acknowledge that such venues may differ from traditional clubs.
liability.p3: We do not warrant that our website, its servers, or emails sent from Wêrê Klub are free of viruses or other harmful components. We strive to provide a secure online environment but cannot guarantee absolute security.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.p1: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Wêrê Klub, its organizers, employees, agents, and partners from and against all losses, expenses, damages, and costs, including reasonable attorneys' fees, resulting from any violation of these Terms or any activity related to your engagement with our services or events (including negligent or wrongful conduct).

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.p1: These Terms and any dispute or claim arising out of or in connection with them (including non-contractual disputes or claims) shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Côte d'Ivoire, the home of Wêrê Klub.

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.p1: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will aim to provide at least 30 days' notice on our website or through direct communication (if you've subscribed to updates) before new terms take effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
changes.p2: By continuing to access or use our Service or attend our events after revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: If you have any questions about these Terms, or wish to learn more about Wêrê Klub and our mission to energize Abidjan's music scene, please contact us at: contact@wereklub.com.
contact.p2: Thanks for coming through—and see you on the dancefloor.

galleryPage.description: Explore our archives. From electrifying performances to behind-the-scenes moments, discover the energy and passion that defines our community.
